channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Clarity Act amendments would remake key parts of crypto bill but have doubtful future
item.description: The U.S. crypto market structure bill is being targeted with dozens of amendments aiming to change or add to the text as its Senate hearing approaches.

item.title: Animoca-backed NUVA connects Figure's $19 billion of tokenized assets to Ethereum
item.description: The protocol, led by veteran BNY executive Anthony Moro, aims to connect real-world assets with DeFi markets, starting with home equity lines of credit and Treasuries.

item.title: Half of AI Health Advice Is Wrong—And Seems Just Right
item.description: A peer-reviewed audit in BMJ Open found that nearly 50% of health responses from five major AI chatbots were problematic, with fabricated sources and confident delivery.

item.title: Crypto wallet provider Ledger puts U.S. IPO plans on hold due to market conditions
item.description: The French crypto security firm, which is said to have explored a potential $4 billion U.S. listing, is reassessing its public market plans as volatile conditions weigh on investor appetite for crypto IPOs.

item.title: Quantum Computing Threat 'Mostly a Coordination Issue' for Bitcoin: Fireblocks CEO
item.description: Michael Shaulov argued that changing to a post-quantum cryptographic signature scheme is “not a technical challenge” for Bitcoin.

item.title: It’s time for clarity for America’s digital asset markets
item.description: Recent polls have shown that registered voters want America to set the rules for global finance, reinforcing why the Senate must act now, explains Smith.

item.title: Farage faces UK standards probe over $7M gift from crypto billionaire
item.description: UK Reform Party leader Nigel Farage is reportedly facing a probe over an undeclared donation from crypto billionaire Christopher Harborne that he received before becoming an MP in 2024.

item.title: Anthropic, OpenAI tokens plunge as AI firms say pre-IPO share transfers are invalid
item.description: Tokens on Solana that claim to track the private-market valuations of Anthropic and OpenAI dropped sharply this week after both AI companies warned that the structures used to back the tokens may be invalid.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: SUI drops 3.2% as index trades lower
item.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 2.7% from Tuesday, joined Sui (SUI) as an underperformer.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin dips below $80,000 as producer price inflation surges to 6%
item.description: U.S. PPI surged well above forecasts in April, reviving concerns that rising oil prices and Iran-related supply risks may feed another inflation wave.

item.title: Metaplanet Q1 profit jumps, but Bitcoin losses hit bottom line
item.description: Metaplanet posted strong Q1 operating income driven by Bitcoin options revenue, but swung to a $728 million loss as BTC price declines triggered valuation markdowns.

item.title: Bitcoin to $100K in Q2? Strategy’s STRC unlocks potential to buy 3K BTC in two days
item.description: Strategy’s potential 3,127 BTC buy this week, alongside falling stablecoin dominance, suggests more capital may enter the Bitcoin market.

item.title: The 2020 signal returns: Why the copper-to-gold breakout could point to bitcoin breakout
item.description: The ratio has climbed above its 200-day moving average for the first time meaningfully since September 2020, a move that has historically preceded major bitcoin rallies.

item.title: JUST IN: $12 trillion Charles Schwab is officially rolling out spot bitcoin trading to retail clients: "Starting today, the first group of clients can trade Bitcoin" 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBhYm5BdmJXdGxObVl0eVR4MXFTNTh0X2pZazBMMk9VN25zQnJpb0RrX1diOGVHU1ZPY2NlNkZpTzYybWQtbnlsN3BZZmZrWEpHbFUtbUdDNElYdUc1enhFam1hdU9yNFE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $12 trillion Charl…

item.title: Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement for AI agent payments
item.description: Coinbase-backed x402 adds batch settlement, letting AI agents authorize many small payments offchain before settling them later onchain.

item.title: Tokenized Treasuries hit $15 billion as bitcoin stalls, Fed rate-rise concerns build
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 13, 2026

item.title: Arkham maps Iran central bank wallets after $344M USDT freeze
item.description: Arkham’s new map links OFAC‑sanctioned Tron wallets to Iran’s central bank, putting Tehran’s alleged onchain reserves and counterparties in full public view.

item.title: Morning Minute: CPI Comes In Hot; Stocks, Crypto Shrug
item.description: Hot CPI didn't stall markets for long, while the Clarity Act has already received 100 amendments ahead of tomorrow's markup.

item.title: Bitcoin holds below $81,000 with Trump-Xi talks on the horizon
item.description: Bitcoin held steady before President Donald Trump's with his Chinese counterpart, Xi Jinping.

item.title: Bitcoin price history suggests 77% odds of new all-time high within a year
item.description: Bitcoin reduces its drop from all-time highs to 35% in a move that sparked new BTC price all-time highs "within a year" on seven occasions in the past.

item.title: Vietnam eyes Q3 launch for regulated crypto asset market: Report
item.description: Vietnam’s deputy minister of finance reportedly said the country is planning to launch its regulated cryptocurrency market in the third quarter of 2026 to answer the growing demand for digital assets.

item.title: Jane Street slashes Bitcoin ETF holdings, adds Ether funds in Q1 2026
item.description: Jane Street cut Bitcoin ETF holdings sharply in Q1 2026, including IBIT and FBTC, while adding at least $82 million in Ether ETF exposure.

item.title: The $82,000 battle: bitcoin tests key resistance zone to form next major breakout
item.description: BTC is fighting a technical battle as it trades just below two closely watched long-term trend indicators: the 200-day Simple Moving Average and the 200-day Exponential Moving Average.

item.title: Charles Schwab begins U.S. rollout of spot crypto trading for retail customers
item.description: An initial group of clients can now trade bitcoin and ether on the Schwab Crypto platform.

item.title: EToro reiterates commitment to crypto despite falling activity in Q1
item.description: CEO Yoni Assia says he’s bullish on crypto and expects to see it back to all-time highs this year even as crypto derivatives trading on eToro dropped.

item.title: EToro profits rise as commodities boom offsets crypto trading slump
item.description: EToro posted its strongest quarter as a public company, with net income up 37% to $82 million, but crypto trade volumes fell 32% in April.

item.title: 🚨 TOMORROW IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DAY FOR CRYPTO IN U.S. The U.S. Senate Banking Committee votes on the CLARITY Act tomorrow, May 14, the first comprehensive crypto regulation bill in U.S. history. It defines which crypto assets are regulated - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE84MS1ZQXk3MEpGQzg5dHotTTlMYmlwWkxCT2o3UDZ3MC00SS1ESUdjLUc4Z25rci01Z2VOOXJEaGljZDdmU19wck1tR0ZPQnNXNXAxei15bjVVaUc5ampLYkRqdw?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 TOMORROW IS THE MOST IMPORTAN…

item.title: Upexi falls 8% after widened fiscal Q3 net loss
item.description: Upexi increased its Solana holdings to 2.5 million, valued at more than $238 million, making it the second-largest listed corporate Solana treasury, behind Forward Industries.

item.title: Legend becomes latest DeFi app to throw in towel
item.description: “The product that wins isn’t the one that explains crypto better, it’s the one that hides it completely,” said CEO Jayson Hobby.

item.title: XRP tops bitcoin, ether volumes on major South Korean exchanges
item.description: XRP/KRW was the most traded pair on Upbit and second on Bithumb, a familiar Korean market signal that has often preceded sharper moves in the token.

item.title: Hyperliquid ETF attracts $1.2M inflows in 'very solid' US debut
item.description: 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF debuted in the US to a “very solid day” of trading, despite volumes being below comparatively buzzy crypto ETF debuts.

item.title: CFTC backs prediction market Kalshi in appeals court fight against Ohio
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has urged the Sixth Circuit Court of Appeals to rule that the agency has jurisdiction over prediction markets.

item.title: Bitcoin back above $81,000 after hot CPI print, BNB, DOGE lead majors gains
item.description: Bitcoin rolled back to $81,200 after dipping to $79,800 on Tuesday's hotter-than-expected U.S. inflation reading, while BNB zoomed 2.5% over 24 hours and dogecoin added 1.3% as crypto funds saw their strongest weekly inflows in months.

item.title: Ethereum community launches security feature to end blind signing
item.description: Crypto platforms Ledger, Trezor, MetaMask, Keycard, WalletConnect, Argot and Fireblocks are among the earliest adopters and contributors to Clear Signing, aimed at ending “blind signing.”

item.title: Kelp DAO eyes reopening withdrawals after rsETH burn
item.description: Kelp DAO has burned the exploiter’s tokens and outlined a two-week plan to refill rsETH through Aave’s Recovery Guardian multisig wallet.

item.title: Iran war, AI spending could push Bitcoin back to $126K this year: Hayes
item.description: Arthur Hayes said military spending and the possible prioritization of infrastructure investment by US allies over trading US Treasurys and equities will lead to further fiat printing and benefit crypto.

item.title: Nevada regulators push back after prediction market conference blames them for move
item.description: Spokesperson for regulator denies that it put pressure on ARIA Resort & Casino for hosting Predict 2026

item.title: US senators file over 100 amendments to crypto bill ahead of markup
item.description: A leaked list shows Senate Banking Committee members have filed more than 100 amendments to a crypto bill, highlighting the issues likely to be debated at a markup on Thursday.

item.title: JPMorgan to launch tokenized money market fund for stablecoin issuers
item.description: JPMorgan’s filing comes nearly three weeks after rival investment bank Morgan Stanley launched its own money market fund, the Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio.

item.title: Trailer for $POSITIONS, a new comedic thriller about modern crypto schemes. Now avaliable on VOD. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE01OFFBMzMwZTZCWHBfS2ZXVFVObjVzN1Fnd0QwWTVMN0lpZ1BuMThfWmVnSlI5UnFkZFN2TXFQekdpTFRxYlFTc3lCeW9BV2tRSXU4V1RBcVNWYVV1MUlIZlhCbjlBZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Trailer for $POSITIONS, a ne…

item.title: 🔥 NEW: Ethereum Foundation rolls out Clear Signing, an open standard that replaces blind signing with human-readable transactions, bringing a major security upgrade to Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE41RUpOUHZETWQwX0FiQTdFNkpoQmRqMDV1OXpyR20xanpyQ1ltSTR6aUpvNmFDWEgzdTVWVlhEQlpuVmpaS0hJb2pFMXZNcTZUd0g3THFfTHdhOWl1RFQ3M0hsSWk?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 NEW: Ethereum Foundation rol…

item.title: Bermuda to transition ‘key’ financial services to Stellar blockchain
item.description: Bermuda Premier David Burt announced several crypto-related initiatives to bring the island nation closer to the industry, including accepting and investing in digital assets and on-chain financial services.

item.title: Hackers Insert Malware Into Mistral AI Software Download
item.description: Microsoft Threat Intelligence said attackers placed malicious code inside a Mistral AI software download distributed through a Python package.

item.title: Crypto markets continue to attract massive inflows: Crypto funds posted +$858 million in inflows last week, the 6th consecutive weekly intake. Over this period, investors poured a total of +$4.7 billion into these funds. Crypto funds have now seen inflows in 10 of - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE15VWhfRTVXM0JMTlp0M0VQNlRVMUFDOVV4MkRpNHN0dkg3MUVqd2p2WHZQZi01bXhQMDBqVmtTMFU2TTFfRUdKSmRTdTBMYl9EZm1pMTNkRUZSZWp5VEJacmUySDJXZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto markets continue to a…

item.title: JPMorgan Files to Launch Tokenized Money Market Fund on Ethereum
item.description: Global banking giant JPMorgan filed for a new tokenized money market fund that will initially run on the Ethereum network.

item.title: I don't see signals on #Bitcoin of exhaustion. Not at all. It's a gradual move upwards with constant momentum. Every dip is constantly being bought up, which means that we need to see first whether resistance breaks to show whether the markets are actually d - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFA3eHJGdlN5dFZENjlMTVUwVnY0dnFpMXJQdWxrYjA1aWhIYjRybmlIa0dDUENPblYwU3BxeFhOQmotZ09rNk9ZVGtqVE9qY2VSNFpjLUZzeWxSOW5uLTctTHlMOA?oc=5" target="_blank">I don't see signals on #Bitcoin …

item.title: Bitcoin Wallet Firm Exodus Expands Payments Push, Sells $87 Million in BTC
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin wallet firm Exodus (EXOD) is moving beyond that initial category to focus on the full crypto payments stack.

item.title: JPMorgan files to launch new tokenized fund as Wall Street tokenization race heats up
item.description: The global banking giant is expanding its tokenized money market lineup, following BlackRock's similar move just a few days ago.

item.title: JUST IN: JPMorgan to launch tokenized money-market fund on Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5kOHB1XzVsSWxkTTNYYXRZSXNTWlN2MjR5WWFUVUx1UUEySGhybVZ6NnM3d1ptdkNTMjh5S1dYbU5MNFFYT2haYi0wV1RIVlNLNHFRczZTM3NrbFlZTXlzRXlR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: JPMorgan to launch tokeni…

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve governor, with chair vote expected
item.description: The US Senate voted largely along partisan lines to confirm Kevin Warsh as a member of the Fed's Board of Governors, despite many Democrats’ concerns about the central bank’s independence.

item.title: Fake OpenAI Repo Hit #1 on Hugging Face—And Stole Passwords While It Trended
item.description: A lookalike repository impersonating OpenAI's Privacy Filter model racked up 244,000 downloads in under 18 hours before Hugging Face pulled it.

item.title: Android Is About to Get a Lot Smarter With Google AI Boosts—Here's How
item.description: Google launched Gemini Intelligence, a feature suite that aims to turn Android devices into proactive AI assistants.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Sells $1.5 Billion in BTC, Reports $1.26 Billion Q1 Loss
item.description: MARA liquidated Bitcoin holdings to fund debt buybacks and acquire a power plant as it joins the industry shift to AI infrastructure.

item.title: Ethereum Developers Propose Fix to 'Blind Signing' Risk Tied to Massive Losses
item.description: Ethereum developers proposed a solution that would end "blind signing," a technical feature that has led to potentially billions in losses.

item.title: Anthropic and OpenAI Warn Buyers: Unauthorized AI Startup Shares May Be Worthless
item.description: Both companies declared SPV-based share schemes invalid this week—and Anthropic named names, including Forge Global.

item.title: Wall Street's Clearinghouse DTCC Enlists Chainlink for Collateral Management
item.description: DTCC teams with Chainlink to enable round-the-clock collateral movement—a shift that could reshape post-trade finance.

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation unveils new 'Clear Signing' standard to stop users from approving malicious crypto transactions
item.description: The move comes after billions in losses from phishing attacks and wallet drains, with Ethereum pushing to make transaction approvals safer and easier to understand.

item.title: Senate confirms Kevin Warsh to Fed board ahead of expected Chair vote
item.description: Warsh’s confirmation to the Fed board positions the crypto-linked investor to replace Jerome Powell as chair amid inflation and digital asset policy debates.

item.title: OpenAI Faces Lawsuit Over Claims ChatGPT Encouraged Teen's Fatal Overdose
item.description: The family of a deceased 19-year-old college student alleges ChatGPT encouraged dangerous drug use and contributed to his fatal overdose.

item.title: What Is Strategy (MSTR)? The Bitcoin Treasury Company
item.description: Software firm Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) and its co-founder Michael Saylor have become synonymous with Bitcoin. Here’s what you need to know.
